TestCaseSteps: 1. Login 2. Navigate to PIM > Add Employee 3. Enter unique FirstName and LastName 4. Assign unique Employee ID 5. Save 6. Verify redirection to Personal Details 7. Verify FirstName/LastName in form 8. Verify name in Employee List
1. Login 2. Navigate to PIM > Employee List 3. Search by name using autocomplete hints 4. Click Search 5. Verify employee row appears in table
1. Login 2. Navigate to PIM > Employee List 3. Search and click Edit icon 4. Update LastName 5. Save 6. Verify Success toast 7. Re-verify updated name in Personal Details form
1. Login 2. Navigate to PIM > Employee List 3. Search and click Trash icon 4. Confirm 'Yes, Delete' 5. Verify Success toast 6. Verify row is hidden using expect.poll
1. Login 2. Navigate to Leave > Configure > Leave Types 3. Click Add 4. Enter unique name 5. Save 6. Verify Success toast 7. Verify name in list
1. Login 2. Navigate to Leave > Configure > Leave Types 3. Verify target leave type row is visible in the table card
1. Login 2. Navigate to Leave > Configure > Leave Types 3. Click Edit icon 4. Update name 5. Save 6. Verify Success toast 7. Verify updated name in list
1. Login 2. Navigate to Leave > Configure > Leave Types 3. Click Trash icon 4. Confirm 'Yes, Delete' 5. Verify Success toast 6. Verify row is hidden
1. Login 2. Navigate to Claim > Configuration > Events 3. Click Add 4. Enter unique event name 5. Save 6. Verify Success toast 7. Verify event in list
1. Login 2. Navigate to Claim > Configuration > Events 3. Search by name 4. Verify event row is visible
1. Login 2. Navigate to Claim > Configuration > Events 3. Search and click Edit icon 4. Update name 5. Save 6. Verify Success toast 7. Verify updated name in list
1. Login 2. Navigate to Claim > Configuration > Events 3. Search and click Trash icon 4. Confirm 'Yes, Delete' 5. Verify Success toast 6. Verify row is hidden
1. Login 2. Navigate to Claim > Submit Claim 3. Select Event and Currency 4. Enter Remarks 5. Click Create 6. Verify Success toast 7. Verify claim in My Claims list
1. Login 2. Navigate to Claim > My Claims 3. Search by event name 4. Click View Details 5. Verify Details page loads
1. Login 2. Navigate to Claim > My Claims 3. View Details of an Initiated claim 4. Click Cancel 5. Verify Success toast 6. Verify status updated to Cancelled
1. Login 2. Navigate to My Claims 3. View Details 4. Attempt UI Delete (Hybrid Fallback to DB) 5. Confirm deletion 6. Verify record removal
